    at()[1/2]
atAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >at
template<typename T> 
T & Alib::AArray< T >::at (const std::vector< size_t > & idx)[inline]00101                                         {
00102         if(idx.size()!=p_shape.rank()) throw std::invalid_argument("at: rank mismatch");
00103         return p_dataPtr->at(p_shape.flatIndex(idx));
00104     }

00106         if(idx.size()!=p_shape.rank()) throw std::invalid_argument("at: rank mismatch");
00107         return p_dataPtr->at(p_shape.flatIndex(idx));
00108     }



    broadcastBinaryOp()
broadcastBinaryOpAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >broadcastBinaryOp
template<typename T> template<typename Op> 
AArray< T > Alib::AArray< T >::broadcastBinaryOp (const AArray< T > & lhs, const AArray< T > & rhs, Op op)[inline], [static], [protected]00205                                                                                         {
00206         AShape resultShape = AShape::broadcast(lhs.shape(),rhs.shape());
00207         AArray<T> result(resultShape);
00208 
00209         const auto& lhsDims=lhs.shape().dims();
00210         const auto& rhsDims=rhs.shape().dims();
00211         const auto& lhsStrides=lhs.shape().strides();
00212         const auto& rhsStrides=rhs.shape().strides();
00213         const auto& resDims=resultShape.dims();
00214 
00215         auto& resData = result.p_dataPtr;
00216         const auto& lhsData = lhs.p_dataPtr;
00217         const auto& rhsData = rhs.p_dataPtr;
00218 
00219         size_t rankRes = resultShape.rank();
00220         size_t rankL = lhs.shape().rank();
00221         size_t rankR = rhs.shape().rank();
00222 
00223         for(size_t i=0;i<resultShape.totalSize();++i){
00224             size_t idx=i;
00225             size_t lhsIdx=0, rhsIdx=0;
00226             for(int d=int(rankRes)-1;d>=0;--d){
00227                 size_t cur = idx % resDims[d];
00228 
00229                 size_t ldim = (d>=rankRes-rankL)?lhsDims[d-(rankRes-rankL)]:1;
00230                 size_t rdim = (d>=rankRes-rankR)?rhsDims[d-(rankRes-rankR)]:1;
00231 
00232                 size_t lstride=(d>=rankRes-rankL)?lhsStrides[d-(rankRes-rankL)]:0;
00233                 size_t rstride=(d>=rankRes-rankR)?rhsStrides[d-(rankRes-rankR)]:0;
00234 
00235                 lhsIdx += (ldim==1?0:cur*lstride);
00236                 rhsIdx += (rdim==1?0:cur*rstride);
00237 
00238                 idx/=resDims[d];
00239             }
00240             (*resData)[i] = op((*lhsData)[lhsIdx], (*rhsData)[rhsIdx]);
00241         }
00242 
00243         return result;
00244     }

Reimplemented from Alib::AObject.
00084                                  {
00085         size_t h=0;
00086         for(const auto& v:*p_dataPtr) h ^= std::hash<T>{}(v)+0x9e3779b9+(h<<6)+(h>>2);
00087         return h;

    inplaceBinaryOp()
inplaceBinaryOpAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >inplaceBinaryOp
template<typename T> template<typename Op> 
void Alib::AArray< T >::inplaceBinaryOp (const AArray< T > & rhs, Op op)[inline]00164                                                      {
00165         auto result = broadcastBinaryOp(*this,rhs,op);
00166         *this = std::move(result);
00167     }



    m_copy()
m_copyAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >m_copy
template<typename T> 
void Alib::AArray< T >::m_copy (const AArray< T > & other)[inline], [protected]00190                                     {
00191         AObject::m_copy(other);
00192         p_shape=other.p_shape;
00193         p_dataPtr=std::make_shared<std::vector<T>>(*other.p_dataPtr);
00194     }

    reshape()
reshapeAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >reshape
template<typename T> 
void Alib::AArray< T >::reshape (const std::vector< size_t > & newDims)[inline]00138                                                   {
00139         size_t newTotal=std::accumulate(newDims.begin(),newDims.end(),1ULL,std::multiplies<size_t>());
00140         if(newTotal != size()) throw std::invalid_argument("reshape: total mismatch");
00141         p_shape.setDims(newDims);
00142     }

    slice()
sliceAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >slice
template<typename T> 
AArray< T > Alib::AArray< T >::slice (const std::vector< size_t > & start, const std::vector< size_t > & stop, const std::vector< size_t > & step = {}
) const[inline]00124                                                           {
00125         std::vector<size_t> sstep = step.empty()? std::vector<size_t>(p_shape.rank(),1):step;
00126         AShape newShape = p_shape.sliceShape(start,stop,sstep);
00127         AArray<T> result(newShape);
00128         for(size_t i=0;i<result.size();++i){
00129             size_t srcIdx=p_shape.flatIndexFromSlice(i,start,sstep);
00130             (*result.p_dataPtr)[i]=(*p_dataPtr)[srcIdx];
00131         }
00132         return result;
00133     }



    transpose()
transposeAlib::AArray< T >
Alib::AArray< T >transpose
template<typename T> 
AArray< T > Alib::AArray< T >::transpose (const std::vector< size_t > & axes = {}
) const[inline]00147                                                               {
00148         AShape tshape = p_shape;
00149         if(axes.empty()){
00150             std::vector<size_t> perm(p_shape.rank());
00151             for(size_t i=0;i<p_shape.rank();++i) perm[i]=p_shape.rank()-1-i;
00152             tshape.transpose(perm);
00153         } else tshape.transpose(axes);
00154         AArray<T> result;
00155         result.p_shape = tshape;
00156         result.p_dataPtr = p_dataPtr; // shared view
00157         return result;
00158     }
